judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes all required source-backed actions in the correct order: rinse the eye 15–20 minutes, remove contact lenses after 5 minutes if present and continue rinsing, and contact poison control or a doctor once rinsing begins. It preserves the do-not-stop-rinsing warning and matches the structured truth closely in clear, usable Bangla.
